message: try to make copy-paste work across hosts

files.patch:
@@ -188,6 +188,32 @@ bind -T copy-mode-vi j send-keys -X cursor-down                        # j: move
 bind -T copy-mode-vi k send-keys -X cursor-up                          # k: move up
 bind -T copy-mode-vi l send-keys -X cursor-right                       # l: move right
 
+
+
+# From https://gist.github.com/yudai/95b20e3da66df1b066531997f982b57b?permalink_comment_id=5733735#gistcomment-5733735
+# to try to make copy-past work
+
+set -s set-clipboard external
+set -g allow-passthrough on
+set -as terminal-features ",*:RGB,clipboard"
+
+# works for many:
+set -ag terminal-overrides ",*:Ms=\\E]52;c%p1%.0s;%p2%s\\7"
+
+# RADICAL: write OSC52 straight to the client TTY, bypassing tmux’s path
+bind -T copy-mode-vi y \
+  send -X copy-pipe-and-cancel \
+  "sh -c 'b64=\$(dd bs=1 count=100000 status=none | base64 | tr -d \"\n\"); printf \"\033]52;c;%s\a\" \"\$b64\" > \"\$1\"' sh #{client_tty}"
+
+bind -T copy-mode-vi Enter \
+  send -X copy-pipe-and-cancel \
+  "sh -c 'b64=\$(dd bs=1 count=100000 status=none | base64 | tr -d \"\n\"); printf \"\033]52;c;%s\a\" \"\$b64\" > \"\$1\"' sh #{client_tty}"
+
+bind -T copy-mode-vi MouseDragEnd1Pane \
+  send -X copy-pipe-and-cancel \
+  "sh -c 'b64=\$(dd bs=1 count=100000 status=none | base64 | tr -d \"\n\"); printf \"\033]52;c;%s\a\" \"\$b64\" > \"\$1\"' sh #{client_tty}"
+
+
 # ============================================================================
 # Optional customizations
 # ============================================================================
